div.p: Constraint: Single query norm calculation + Sequential SIMD access Intel AVX-256 / AVX-512 Implementation Grade Spec

ul.li: Memory Alignment: Vectors MUST be 32-byte (YMM) or 64-byte (ZMM) aligned to ensure _mm256_load_ps (vmovaps) instructions do not fault.
Prefetching: Hardware prefetchers detect linear sequential access in M1 and populate L1 cache before the SIMD unit requests the next address.
AVX-512 Upgrade: To upgrade to ZMM, increase buffer alignment to 64B and switch to _mm512_ intrinsics.
Cosine vs L2: For L2, replace _mm256_fmadd_ps with _mm256_sub_ps + _mm256_mul_ps.

g.title: Computed once per search batch to reuse for Cosine Similarity
Broadcasting q_i to 8 lanes for parallel FMA
Loading 8 floats (256 bits) from memory per cycle
